mandate: The operator's allowed trading pool is the declared 21 mature OKX USDT perpetual swaps, but no strategy is required to trade all 21 or any minimum breadth. A new strategy may trade any prospectively frozen subset from one to 21 symbols when the subset follows directly from the mechanism or point-in-time data availability. Profitability and robustness are the objective; symbol count is not an objective.

selection_boundary.reason: The 21 symbols are the operator's maximum allowed trading pool, not a mandatory portfolio breadth.
not_allowed: adding or removing symbols because candidate PnL, profit factor, drawdown or win rate improved
testing all symbols and retaining only historical winners
deleting a losing symbol after opening returns
rotating into the historical top performers
claiming that evidence from a narrow subset generalizes to the other allowed symbols
using the 307-contract point-in-time universe as a mandatory promotion gate
selection_boundary.future_replacement_rule: A delisting or permanent loss of tradability may trigger a separate prospective governance decision. No replacement may be selected from candidate PnL or retrospective factor performance.

permitted_selection_bases: the mechanism is intrinsically specific to the declared asset or assets
the same point-in-time raw field and economic definition exists only for the declared subset
the declared subset shares a pre-existing protocol or market structure not shared by the rest of the allowed pool
history length or causal data quality passes a frozen minimum before any candidate returns are opened
a prospective liquidity or tradability rule frozen before candidate returns are opened
forbidden_selection_bases: removing a symbol that lost money
choosing the best-performing subset from a symbol search

required_replacements: leave-one-symbol-out diagnostic without deleting the frozen member set
purged time splits and market regimes

new_candidate_subset_policy.legacy_coverage_result_interpretation: A historical failure caused only by an 18-symbol or 21-symbol breadth requirement remains valid for that broad cross-sectional design but is not a global rejection of a prospectively frozen single-asset or small-subset mechanism. Reopening requires a new return-blind protocol and may not use previously viewed outcomes to choose the subset.

H22.role: existing frozen fixed-21-pool conditional strategy candidate
H22.eligibility_note: The frozen H22 implementation uses its predeclared 18-symbol funding-complete eligible subset inside the allowed 21-symbol pool. The new subset policy does not permit deleting members or changing H22.
H22.acceptance: Keep the original 60-day/50-observation stage and 90-day/80-observation preferred prospective gates. Do not alter parameters, membership rules, cadence, direction, costs or dates after outcomes are observed.

V357.role: existing frozen fixed-21-pool conditional strategy candidate
V357.eligibility_note: The frozen V357 members continue to apply their existing warmup, reference-symbol and feature-availability rules within the allowed 21-symbol pool. The new subset policy does not permit post-hoc member deletion.
V357.acceptance: Keep the original frozen prospective acceptance protocol. No A-grade or formal admission is allowed before all time, trade-count, cost, drawdown and applicable concentration gates pass.

H27.role: record-only diversification observer, not an independent strategy candidate
H27.acceptance: Read only the frozen H22 and V357 prospective ledgers. Do not search weights, alter members or use historical combination results for promotion.

dynamic_universe_evidence.interpretation: The dynamic-universe audits show that H22 and V357 should not be described as portable broad-market strategies. They do not require every future candidate to trade all 21 allowed symbols, and they do not disqualify a prospectively frozen asset-specific mechanism.

promotion_boundary: A candidate's subset must be frozen before its returns are opened. Historical evidence remains conditional and cannot approve a strategy by itself. The decisive evidence is the candidate-specific locked historical protocol plus frozen prospective acceptance, with cross-symbol concentration applied only when the frozen subset contains at least six symbols.
runtime_boundary: This policy does not enable orders, positions, account access or automatic trading. The application remains SIGNAL_ONLY.
